description: V4.1 pool selection, session alignment (design doc §10 step 1b): in a session that already engaged on mentoring, a program-ambiguous 'volunteer process' turn must NOT pad the CTA selection with the other program's CTAs (the 2026-07-04 Love-Box-bleed incident shape). Live classifier + real selectCTAsFromPool. Assertions hold under any plausible classification: volunteer_general → session alignment narrows the pool; mentoring_learn → care-box CTAs never pool; null → fallback_tags ['volunteer'] pools only the aligned pair.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

topic_definitions.name: mentoring_learn
topic_definitions.description: User wants to learn about the youth mentoring program — what it is, how it works, who it serves, the matching process.

topic_definitions.name: carebox_learn
topic_definitions.description: User wants to learn about the family care box program — what a care box provides, how families receive support.

topic_definitions.name: volunteer_general
topic_definitions.description: User wants to volunteer or asks about the volunteer process without specifying which program — how to get started, application steps, discovery sessions, difference between programs.

kb_context: Becoming a Helping Hands volunteer: 1) Complete the volunteer application form online. 2) Attend a 30-minute phone interview with our volunteer coordinator. 3) Pass a background check (we cover the cost). 4) Attend one in-person orientation and training session.

conversation_history.content: Tell me about your mentoring program.
Our mentoring program pairs a caring adult with a young person who has experienced foster care, meeting weekly to build confidence and trust.
